philosophy: Follow operators, not consultants. Only primary sources — people who make decisions, not people who comment on decisions.

x_accounts.name: Satya Nadella
x_accounts.why: Running the world's most valuable enterprise software company — every decision is a case study

x_accounts.name: Aaron Levie
x_accounts.why: 25 years operating enterprise SaaS — candid about what actually works

x_accounts.name: Parker Conrad
x_accounts.why: Compound startup thesis in practice — rare operator who writes about system design

x_accounts.name: Sam Altman
x_accounts.why: Defining how AI reshapes enterprise — primary source on capability timelines

x_accounts.name: Jensen Huang
x_accounts.why: Infrastructure operator — his calls on compute shape every enterprise AI decision

x_accounts.name: Dharmesh Shah
x_accounts.why: Building AI into enterprise product — transparent about lessons learned

x_accounts.name: Jason Lemkin
x_accounts.why: Operator-turned-community builder — real GTM data from 10,000+ SaaS founders

x_accounts.name: Patrick Collison
x_accounts.why: Rare CEO who publishes primary research and operational principles

x_accounts.name: Dario Amodei
x_accounts.why: AI safety operator — how he thinks about enterprise deployment risk

x_accounts.name: Brian Chesky
x_accounts.why: Rebuilt company from scratch — post-COVID ops lessons apply broadly

x_accounts.name: Marc Benioff
x_accounts.why: 30 years of enterprise sales — Agentforce deployment is real-time case study

podcasts.name: How I Built This
podcasts.why: Founders tell operational stories in their own words — no analyst filter

podcasts.name: Acquired
podcasts.why: Deep company histories from primary documents — earnings calls, S-1s, interviews

podcasts.name: My First Million
podcasts.why: Operators sharing real numbers and tactics — not theory

primary_sources.name: Microsoft Investor Relations
primary_sources.why: Satya's actual language on enterprise AI adoption — quarterly

primary_sources.name: Stripe Annual Letter
primary_sources.why: Patrick Collison's operator principles — published annually

primary_sources.name: HubSpot Product Blog
primary_sources.why: Dharmesh's AI integration decisions — real product decisions

primary_sources.name: Anthropic News
primary_sources.why: Primary source on Claude enterprise deployment

never_follow: Any 'expert commentary' from someone who hasn't operated a company
